name: MarketingPro
tagline: Full-stack SaaS — Express + React + PostgreSQL + Drizzle ORM + Stripe billing with real-time analytics dashboard
description: Production-ready SaaS platform with auth, subscription billing via Stripe, admin dashboard, and real-time analytics. Built on Express + React + Vite + PostgreSQL with Drizzle ORM. Radix UI components. The full stack from zero to deployable SaaS in one project.
content_angles: Full-stack SaaS: auth, Stripe billing, dashboards, analytics
Modern stack: React + Express + PostgreSQL + Drizzle ORM
Stripe subscription management with webhook handling
